title: TF2 Poop - Meet the 10 Nutshells
description:
Why wasting multiple minutes of your life watching all TF2 trailers if that could be done in 2:35?! Here are all 10 TF2 trailers (except the beta-trailers) in a nutshell!

0:00 Meet the Sandvich
0:11 Engineer Update Teaser
0:15 Meet the Scout
0:32 Meet the Sniper
0:55 Mac Trailer
1:05 Meet the Demoman
1:25 Meet the Engineer
1:45 Meet the Spy
2:21 Meet the Heavy
2:35 Meet the Soldier
2:53 Meet the Medic

To explain the Sniper part: "At the end of the day: D(e)ad." The e is in brackets so it's supposed to say "Dad". At the end of the day he calls his Dad what happens just after that scene. The picture shows the Heavy so the Heavy is his Dad. His parents do not care so he climbs up a tower and shoots his Dad. "Dead!" At the end, he tells his dead Dad that his Momma do(es) not care too. So he shoots her (the Medic) as well. "Dead!"

DasMatze
